title: Gloriously Smoky Chinese Tofu Buddha Jumps Over Wall
description: A smoky and comforting Chinese dish featuring ghee and ferment-jang, served in an agave leaf vessel.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together ghee, ferment-jang, smoked paprika, soy sauce, and agave syrup.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the smoky sauce.
Arrange the tofu cubes in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the tofu in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the tofu is roasting, heat the sesame oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the saucepan and saute for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the chopped scallions and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
To serve, place the roasted tofu in an agave leaf vessel and spoon the ginger-scallion sauce over the top.
